repo_notes.content: Developer documentation only. Mirror the repo structure and module boundaries (packages/, apps/, meeseeks_ha_conversation/) with minimal redundancy. Every page must include a meaningful Mermaid diagram that matches the page purpose. Name exact classes, functions, and module paths. Clarify that the API exposes polling; the CLI runs the runtime in-process (no polling); the web console connects via the REST API. Focus on system behavior, abstractions, and integration contracts rather than usage tips. Avoid anthropomorphic language when describing LLM behavior (use 'the model generates' not 'the AI decides').

pages.title: Overview & Repo Map
pages.purpose: Single entry point: repo goals, module boundaries (packages/, apps/, meeseeks_ha_conversation/), and top-level folder ownership.

pages.title: Core Runtime & Orchestration (meeseeks_core)
pages.purpose: How the shared core runtime and orchestration engine work: SessionRuntime as the facade, Orchestrator as the session driver, ToolUseLoop as the execution engine.

pages.title: Session Runtime, Store & Event Log
pages.purpose: SessionRuntime facade, RunRegistry (thread tracking with stdlib queue.Queue/threading.Event for cross-thread steering), SessionStore (JSONL transcripts, tags, archives, attachments), and event log behavior. Polling is API-only; CLI runs in-process.

pages.title: Tool-Use Loop Execution Engine
pages.purpose: ToolUseLoop.run() as the single async execution engine: message construction (system prompt with project instructions, context, attachments), LLM invocation via bind_tools, tool dispatch with asyncio.gather, depth-aware sub-agent prompts, user steering (message_queue drain and interrupt_step check), and cancellation.

pages.title: Agent Hypervisor & Sub-Agent Lifecycle
pages.purpose: AgentHypervisor control plane (admission via Semaphore, registration, step tracking, cancellation, structured cleanup). AgentContext propagation (root vs child, depth control, event_logger inheritance). SpawnAgentTool with filter_specs() for tool scoping (allowlist/denylist, filter-before-binding pattern).

pages.title: LLM Abstraction & Model Routing
pages.purpose: ChatModel protocol, build_chat_model(), LiteLLM multi-provider gateway, provider-qualified model names, per-role model selection (plan/tool/default), and reasoning-effort configuration.

pages.title: Context Builder, Summaries & Compaction
pages.purpose: ContextBuilder.build() pipeline: transcript loading, event filtering, recent event selection, LLM-based context selection, attachment file reading (text files from disk with size caps), token budget tracking, and auto-compaction triggers. ContextSnapshot fields including attachment_texts.

pages.title: Permissions, Hooks & Tool Execution Gates
pages.purpose: PermissionPolicy (allow/deny/ask rules, fnmatch on tool_id and operation), approval callbacks (auto_approve, config-driven, interactive), HookManager pipeline (pre/post tool use, pre-compact, permission request), and agent lifecycle hooks (on_agent_start, on_agent_stop).

pages.title: Data Models, Event Types & Payload Schemas
pages.purpose: ActionStep, PlanStep, TaskQueue, OrchestrationState, EventRecord, and typed payload schemas (UserPayload, AssistantPayload, ToolResultPayload, ActionPlanPayload, CompletionPayload, PermissionPayload, SubAgentPayload). Event type discrimination and JSONL serialization.

pages.title: Tool Layer (meeseeks_tools)
pages.purpose: Tool layer boundaries and integration patterns: how local tools and MCP tools are registered, discovered, and executed.

pages.title: Tool Registry & Spec System
pages.purpose: ToolRegistry, ToolSpec (tool_id, kind, metadata, factory), filter_specs() for allowlist/denylist filtering (shared by Orchestrator and SpawnAgentTool), specs_to_langchain_tools conversion, and tool disabling with reasons.

pages.title: Local Tools (Aider Adapters)
pages.purpose: Edit-block tool (SEARCH/REPLACE format validation, diff generation), file read/list tools, shell tool, and approval gating for set operations.

pages.title: MCP Tool Discovery & Schema Validation
pages.purpose: MCP config (configs/mcp.json), server discovery, schema normalization, per-server failure isolation, _coerce_mcp_tool_input validation, and manifest caching.

pages.title: REST API (meeseeks_api)
pages.purpose: Flask-restx API: route structure, authentication (X-API-Key), CORS, how handlers bind to SessionRuntime, NotificationStore, ShareStore, and the tool registry.

pages.title: API Endpoints, Polling & Steering
pages.purpose: Session CRUD, async query execution (start_async + 202), event polling (/events?after=), user steering (/message for mid-session injection, /interrupt for step interruption), agent tree (/agents from sub_agent events), attachments, share tokens, export, notifications, and the legacy sync /query endpoint. Includes allowed_tools passthrough from context.mcp_tools.

pages.title: Web Console (meeseeks_console)
pages.purpose: React + Vite frontend: connects to the REST API for all orchestration. Session management, event polling (1s interval), conversation timeline (turn grouping from events), execution trace and log viewer, unified diff viewer, MCP tool picker, mid-session steering (sendMessage/interruptStep), sub-agent count indicator, and mock data fallback.

pages.title: Terminal CLI (meeseeks_cli)
pages.purpose: CLI flow: run_cli entry point, Rich-based rendering (plan checklist, tool result cards, response panel), AgentDisplayManager + Rich Live for agent tree display during execution, DialogFactory (Textual-based interactive prompts), in-process SessionRuntime usage (sync, no polling), slash commands, and session management.

pages.title: Home Assistant Integration (meeseeks_ha_conversation)
pages.purpose: HA Conversation integration: async HTTP client calling POST /api/query on the Meeseeks API, MeeseeksApiClient, response parsing, and config flow.

pages.title: Configuration & Runtime Settings
pages.purpose: AppConfig hierarchy (RuntimeConfig, LLMConfig, ContextConfig, AgentConfig, APIConfig, CLIConfig, PermissionsConfig, etc.), configs/app.json and configs/mcp.json resolution, environment variable layering, and per-component config knobs.

pages.title: CI/CD, Docker & Docs Pipeline
pages.purpose: GitHub Actions workflows (lint, coverage, docker-buildx for base/api/console images, docs generation), Dockerfile structure (base, api, console with multi-stage node+nginx build), docker-compose stacks (standalone console, full API+console), and mkdocs build pipeline.

pages.title: Testing Patterns & Quality Gates
pages.purpose: Integration-first test patterns: fake tools with ToolSpec interface, AsyncMock for model.ainvoke, full-turn harness tests, event stream assertions, permission and schema coercion coverage. Mock targets (meeseeks_core.tool_registry.get_config_value for filter_specs). Pre-commit hooks (ruff, mypy).

pages.title: Tracing, Logging & Diagnostics
pages.purpose: Loguru-based logging with get_logger(), session_log_context for per-session log capture, Langfuse tracing (session-scoped traces, trace names: meeseeks-tool-use, meeseeks-task-master, meeseeks-context), and error propagation paths through ToolUseLoop._safe_execute.

pages.title: Building a New Client
pages.purpose: Step-by-step walkthrough for extending Meeseeks with a new interface: initialize core services (registry, permissions, SessionRuntime), resolve sessions, handle slash commands, choose sync vs async execution, consume session events, and the project instructions loading mechanism (CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md with meeseeks:noload marker).

page_notes.title: Overview & Repo Map
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: module map with subgraphs by top-level folder (packages/, apps/, meeseeks_ha_conversation/). Show Console -> API -> Runtime -> Core flow.

page_notes.title: Core Runtime & Orchestration (meeseeks_core)
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: runtime facade flow (SessionRuntime -> Orchestrator -> ToolUseLoop) showing how CLI (sync), API (async), and Console (via API) reach the same engine.

page_notes.title: Session Runtime, Store & Event Log
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: sequence for async run showing RunRegistry.start() creating thread-safe queue/event, thread spawning, JSONL event log writes, and API polling. Include RunHandle fields.

page_notes.title: Tool-Use Loop Execution Engine
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: ToolUseLoop step cycle (build messages with context/attachments -> LLM invoke -> tool dispatch via asyncio.gather -> collect results -> check steering queue/interrupt -> repeat or done). Show spawn_agent as recursive call.

page_notes.title: Agent Hypervisor & Sub-Agent Lifecycle
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: agent tree showing AgentContext.root() -> child() propagation with depth tracking, AgentHypervisor (Semaphore admission, register/unregister, mark_done), SpawnAgentTool calling filter_specs() then creating child ToolUseLoop.

page_notes.title: LLM Abstraction & Model Routing
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: class diagram for ChatModel protocol and build_chat_model, showing LiteLLM provider routing.

page_notes.title: Context Builder, Summaries & Compaction
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: data flow from transcript -> event filtering -> recent_events + selected_events + attachment_texts -> ContextSnapshot -> system prompt injection. Show compaction trigger path.

page_notes.title: Permissions, Hooks & Tool Execution Gates
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: sequence of tool call -> HookManager.run_pre_tool_use -> PermissionPolicy.decide -> approval_callback (if ASK) -> execute -> HookManager.run_post_tool_use. Side track for agent lifecycle hooks.

page_notes.title: Data Models, Event Types & Payload Schemas
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: class diagram for ActionStep, TaskQueue, OrchestrationState, EventRecord with discriminated union of payload types (UserPayload, ToolResultPayload, SubAgentPayload, etc).

page_notes.title: Tool Layer (meeseeks_tools)
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: ToolRegistry -> ToolSpec -> AbstractTool hierarchy, branching to local tool implementations and MCP tool adapters.

page_notes.title: Tool Registry & Spec System
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: class diagram with ToolRegistry (register, list_specs, list_specs_for_mode), ToolSpec, filter_specs(allowed, denied), and specs_to_langchain_tools conversion.

page_notes.title: Local Tools (Aider Adapters)
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: sequence for edit-block tool: input validation (SEARCH/REPLACE format) -> diff generation -> tool_result event. Show approval gate for set operations.

page_notes.title: MCP Tool Discovery & Schema Validation
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: flow from configs/mcp.json -> server discovery -> schema normalization per server -> _coerce_mcp_tool_input validation at execution time.

page_notes.title: REST API (meeseeks_api)
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: request flow from Flask route handlers -> _require_api_key -> SessionRuntime/NotificationStore/ShareStore -> response. Show CORS after_request hook.

page_notes.title: API Endpoints, Polling & Steering
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: sequence showing POST /query -> start_async(allowed_tools) -> 202, then GET /events?after= polling loop, plus POST /message and POST /interrupt steering paths.

page_notes.title: Web Console (meeseeks_console)
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: component hierarchy (App -> HomeView/SessionDetailView -> ConversationTimeline + WorkspacePanel + InputBar) with data flow through hooks (useSessions, useSessionEvents, useSessionQuery) to the API client layer.

page_notes.title: Terminal CLI (meeseeks_cli)
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: sync flow CLI -> SessionRuntime.run_sync -> Orchestrator -> ToolUseLoop -> response rendering. Include AgentDisplayManager lifecycle hook bridge to Rich Live panel.

page_notes.title: Home Assistant Integration (meeseeks_ha_conversation)
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: HA Assist voice -> MeeseeksApiClient -> POST /api/query -> response parsing -> HA conversation response.

page_notes.title: Configuration & Runtime Settings
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: config resolution (configs/app.json -> AppConfig with sub-configs, configs/mcp.json -> MCP registry). Include AgentConfig fields (max_depth, max_concurrent, allowed_models, default_denied_tools, sub_agent_max_steps).

page_notes.title: CI/CD, Docker & Docs Pipeline
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: pipeline flow (push/PR -> lint + mypy + pytest -> coverage -> Docker buildx for base/api/console images -> GHCR push). Separate track for mkdocs build + deploy.

page_notes.title: Testing Patterns & Quality Gates
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: test harness structure showing fake tools + AsyncMock LLM boundary -> ToolUseLoop.run() -> assert event stream and TaskQueue output. Note filter_specs mock target location.

page_notes.title: Tracing, Logging & Diagnostics
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: trace flow from ToolUseLoop -> Langfuse handler -> traces (meeseeks-tool-use, meeseeks-task-master, meeseeks-context). Show error path through _safe_execute -> ToolCallResult(success=False).

page_notes.title: Building a New Client
page_notes.notes: Mermaid: extension flow diagram showing new client -> load_registry + SessionRuntime + permissions -> resolve_session -> run_sync or start_async + poll events. Include project instructions loading (CLAUDE.md with noload marker).
